allow: Bash(find /root /home/nick -name "index.d.ts" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "QuickPickItem" 2>/dev/null | grep -v nvim | grep -v ".vscode/extensions" | head -5; find /root -path "*/pnpm/store*" -name "*.d.ts" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "QuickPickItem" 2>/dev/null | head -3)
